did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper proposes a dermoscopy image retrieval method based on traditional low-level feature extraction (color moments and Gabor wavelets) and SKLSH hashing codes. It explicitly contrasts its approach with deep learning methods (referencing Esteva et al. and Sun's work) and states that its features are extracted using traditional methods, not AI/ML/DL models.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
